Visit to Kastamonu University by Our President

08.11.2024

Our President Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan visited Kastamonu University President Prof. Dr. Ahmet Hamdi Topal within the scope of his meetings in Kastamonu.

Our President Prof. Dr. Atilla Arkan and the accompanying delegation visited Kastamonu University President Prof. Dr. Ahmet Hamdi Topal at Kastamonu University campus on Thursday, November 7, 2024. During the visit, cooperation opportunities and possible joint projects between the universities were discussed.

During the meeting, ideas were exchanged on possible cooperation between the two universities in the fields of education and research, as well as academic programs, student exchange opportunities and other joint projects.

Emphasizing that such meetings will contribute to strengthening the relations between universities, the visit ended after taking a memorable photo.
